sections.getInTouchDescription: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? Feel free to reach out.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

experience.intro: 4+ years building mobile applications across fintech, government, and education sectors. From sole developer to team collaborator.

projectsPage.intro: A selection of mobile applications I've developed across different industries — from national police operations to fintech and education.

contact.intro: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? Feel free to reach out. I'm always open to discussing new opportunities and ideas.

personal.title: Fullstack Mobile Engineer
personal.summary: Passionate mobile developer with 4+ years experience and a keen eye for innovation. With a solid foundation in mobile app development and a proactive approach to staying ahead of emerging trends, I thrive on creating intuitive solutions that enhance productivity and connectivity.

transnovasi.title: Mobile Engineer
transnovasi.description: Sole Mobile Developer for two critical mobile apps for Korlantas Polri (Indonesian National Police Traffic Corps) within the K3I national project.
bullets: Improved the Operation Support App: real-time officer tracking, device monitoring, operational activity reporting for command center situational awareness
Integrated Livekit for real-time video call capabilities
Enhanced stability by refactoring legacy code, implementing robust error handling, restructuring codebases into scalable atomic components
Contributed to the Public App: citizen access to Korlantas services (licensing, traffic info, news)
Operated in a highly agile environment, collaborating with frontend web and backend teams
Implemented Sentry for crash reporting and performance monitoring

pina.title: Mobile Engineer
pina.description: Comprehensive wealth management app offering personalized finance advisory, net worth tracking, financial goal management, and investment options.
bullets: Refurbished authentication: implemented OAuth for Google and Apple login
Redesigned Home screen, account registration, and churning survey
Applied atomic component design principles to restructure UI folder
Developed the Advice feature: financial planning tool for consulting certified financial planners
Collaborated on core features: Invest, NetWorth, Save
Integrated AppsFlyer for attribution tracking and marketing analytics

tataskola.title: Junior Mobile Developer
tataskola.description: School administration platform for handling school-based payments via online transactions.
bullets: Built pixel-perfect UIs for 5 core screens using mock data: Authentication, Home, Student List, Transaction List, Account
Achieved 95%+ design match across breakpoints; reduced rework by 70% via reusable components
Established mock API/data layer and API contracts for future backend integration
Structured modular component architecture; standardized design tokens and styles

tkd.title: Android Developer
tkd.description: Developed two apps: Kupon Makan (food coupon donation system) and Koop (digital savings and loan cooperative).
bullets: Kupon Makan: Redesigned UI with bottom navigation, coupon-style components, notification and donor statistics screens
Koop: Led full UI/UX refurbishment, executed framework migration from Android WebView to React Native
Integrated APIs and finalized screen builds; Koop moved to internal testing in ~2 months
Standardized front-end patterns for consistency and maintainability

operationSupport.description: A mission-critical mobile app built for Korlantas Polri command center — enabling real-time GPS tracking of field officers, device monitoring, operational activity reporting, and on-premise voice/video communication via LiveKit.
details: Migrated legacy JavaScript codebase to TypeScript (3 months)
Migrated to Turbo Monorepo architecture for code sharing and modularity
Implemented real-time GPS officer tracking and device monitoring
Integrated on-premise LiveKit for voice/video communication
Built Atomic Component architecture — custom components, no UI Kit

publicApp.description: A citizen-facing mobile app providing access to Korlantas latest news and digital services — SINAR (driver's license), SIGNAL (vehicle registration), IRSMS (accident reporting), ETLE (traffic enforcement), Balik Desa (homecoming navigation), and regional police office directories.
details: Integrated WebView for multiple Korlantas digital service platforms
Migrated repository into Turbo Monorepo structure
Implemented Atomic Component architecture consistent with Operation Support App

pina.description: A comprehensive wealth management app offering personalized financial advisory, net worth tracking, financial goal management, and investment in stocks and mutual funds.
details: Implemented OAuth authentication (Google & Apple login)
Redesigned Home, registration, and churning survey screens
Built Advice feature for certified financial planner consultations
Integrated AppsFlyer for attribution tracking
Contributed to core Invest, NetWorth, and Save modules

tataskola.description: A school administration mobile app enabling guardians to manage school-based payments through online transactions. Built from scratch based on Figma designs with a CI/CD pipeline for Google Play deployment.
details: Built 5 core screens from scratch: Auth, Home, Student List, Transaction List, Account
Achieved ≥95% design match across breakpoints (pixel-perfect UI)
Reduced rework by 70% through reusable components and design tokens
Defined API contracts and mock services for backend integration
Set up automated deployment pipeline to Google Play

kuponMakan.description: A social impact Android app designed as a digital enabler during COVID-19. Simplifies a coupon-based donation system where donors contribute food coupons to beneficiaries, redeemable at registered vendors.
details: UI/UX redesign: introduced bottom navigation and coupon-style card components
Implemented donor-to-vendor messaging system APIs
Developed Notifications, Coupon Messages, Donor Testimonials & Statistics screens
Standardized front-end patterns for consistency and maintainability

koop.description: A digital financial services app modernizing savings and loan cooperative (koperasi) activities. Enables members to manage savings, apply for loans, and transfer money between members and external bank accounts.
details: Led full UI/UX redesign to modernize the application
Executed complete framework migration from Java WebView to React Native
Integrated required APIs and finalized screen builds
Delivered test-ready build within approximately 2 months
